debug_info.goal:
K : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Field K
inst✝ : NumberField K
x : RingOfIntegers K
y : K
u✝ : RingOfIntegers K
v✝ : (RingOfIntegers K)ˣ
hu : IsUnit u✝
u v : (RingOfIntegers K)ˣ
⊢ ↑↑(u / v) + 1 =
    (algebraMap (RingOfIntegers K) K) ↑u / ↑↑v +
      (algebraMap (RingOfIntegers K) K) ↑u / (algebraMap (RingOfIntegers K) K) ↑u

proof:
have h1 : ((u / v : 𝓞 K) : K) = (u : K) / (v : K) := by
    norm_cast
    <;> simp [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_eq_mul_left_iff, Units.ext_iff]
    <;> field_simp [Units.ext_iff]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> simp_all [Units.ext_iff]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> aesop
  have h2 : ((u : K) / ((v : 𝓞 K) : K) : K) = (u : K) / (v : K) := by
    norm_cast
  have h3 : (u : K) / (u : K) = 1 := by
    have h4 : (u : K) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h
      have h5 : (u : 𝓞 K) = 0 := by
        norm_cast at h ⊢
        <;> simp_all [Units.ext_iff]
        <;> aesop
      simp_all [Units.ext_iff]
      <;> aesop
    field_simp [h4]
  calc
    (↑(u / v : 𝓞 K) + 1 : K) = ((u : K) / (v : K) : K) + 1 := by
      norm_cast
      <;> simp_all [h1]
      <;> aesop
    _ = (u : K) / (v : K) + 1 := by norm_num
    _ = (u : K) / ((v : 𝓞 K) : K) + (u : K) / (u : K) := by
      have h5 : (u : K) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        have h6 : (u : 𝓞 K) = 0 := by
          norm_cast at h ⊢
          <;> simp_all [Units.ext_iff]
          <;> aesop
        simp_all [Units.ext_iff]
        <;> aesop
      have h6 : (v : K) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        have h7 : (v : 𝓞 K) = 0 := by
          norm_cast at h ⊢
          <;> simp_all [Units.ext_iff]
          <;> aesop
        simp_all [Units.ext_iff]
        <;> aesop
      field_simp [h5, h6] at h2 ⊢
      <;> ring_nf at h2 ⊢ <;>
      norm_cast at h2 ⊢ <;>
      simp_all [Units.ext_iff] <;>
      aesop
    _ = (u : K) / ((v : 𝓞 K) : K) + u / u := by
      norm_cast
      <;> simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_eq_mul_left_iff, Units.ext_iff]
      <;> field_simp [Units.ext_iff] <;>
      ring_nf <;>
      simp_all [Units.ext_iff] <;>
      norm_cast <;>
      simp_all [Units.ext_iff] <;>
      aesop
